privacyIntro: This policy explains what personal data {{appName}} processes and how. Please read it carefully.
privacyS1Body: {{legalName}}, {{cui}}, with its registered office at {{address}}, operates the {{appName}} application ({{appUrl}}). For any question regarding personal data, you can write to us at
privacyS2Li2Mid: into the application, you are the
privacyS2Li2Post: , and we process this data only to provide you the service, according to your instructions and the Terms.
privacyS3Li1Body: name, email, phone, email signature, preferences (country, language, Daily Focus time).
privacyS3Li2Body: name, email, phone, notes, source, activity history, offers.
privacyS3Li3Body: sends, opens and clicks (email tracking), to show you the status of your messages.
privacyS3Li4Body: processed by Stripe; we do not store card details.
privacyS4Li1Body: — providing the application and your account.
privacyS4Li2Body: — running the CRM, security, abuse prevention.
privacyS5Intro: We use trusted providers to operate the service:
privacyS5Li3Body: — sending emails (USA, with standard contractual clauses for international transfer).
privacyS5Li4Body: — payment processing (USA, with standard contractual clauses).
privacyS6Li1Body: we delete the data within a maximum of 30 days; backups expire within a maximum of 90 days.
privacyS6Li4Body: kept for a maximum of 12 months.
privacyS6Li5Body: kept according to accounting law (up to 10 years) — this legal obligation prevails over a deletion request.
privacyS7Body1: You have the right of access, rectification, erasure, restriction, portability and objection. You can exercise them directly in the application (export, delete account, delete contact) or by writing to us at
privacyS7Body2: . We respond within a maximum of 30 days. You also have the right to lodge a complaint with
privacyS7Body3: (the Romanian National Supervisory Authority for Personal Data Processing).
privacyS8Body: For emails sent through the application we may record whether they were delivered, opened or whether links were clicked, to show you the status. Recipients can unsubscribe anytime via the link in the email.
privacyS9Body: We use per-user data isolation (Row Level Security), private storage with restricted access, encrypted connections and least-privilege access. No system is 100% secure, but we treat security as a priority.
privacyS10Body: We may update this policy. We'll notify you of significant changes, and the date of the last update appears in the header.
termsIntro: By creating an account and using {{appName}} you agree to these terms.
termsS1Body: {{appName}} is a CRM-type application for independent distributors (offer calculator, contact management, follow-up, resources). We may improve or modify the features over time.
termsS2Body: You are responsible for keeping your login credentials safe and for the activity in your account. You must be at least 18 years old and provide accurate information.
termsS3Body: Certain features require a paid subscription, processed through Stripe. Prices and plans are displayed in the application. You can cancel anytime; access continues until the end of the paid period. Invoices are issued according to applicable legislation.
termsS4Pre: You enter your contacts' data and are the
termsS4Post: of this data. You warrant that:
termsS4Li1: you have the legal right and, where applicable, the consent to process the data of the people you add;
termsS4Li2: you inform those people about the processing and respect their rights (access, deletion, unsubscribe);
termsS4Li3Post: (for example information about health, diagnoses or treatments) in notes or other fields.
termsS4Closing: You are responsible for the legality of the data entered. We provide you the necessary tools (delete contact, disable email, block communication).
termsS5Title: 5. Processing data on your behalf (processor clause / DPA)
termsS5Intro: When we process your contacts' data, we act as a processor. We commit to:
termsS5Li1: process this data only to provide you the service and according to your instructions;
termsS5Li3: use sub-processors (Supabase, Vercel, Resend, Stripe) under equivalent protection obligations;
termsS5Li4: inform you without undue delay in the event of a security incident affecting your data;
termsS5Li5: delete or return the data upon account termination, subject to legal retention obligations.
termsS6Li2: purchased contact lists or lists obtained without a legal basis;
termsS6Li3: illegal, deceptive content or content that infringes third-party rights;
termsS6Li4: attempts to access other users' data.
termsS7Body: {{appName}} is an organization and communication tool. We do not guarantee sales, revenue or business results. Success depends on your activity.
termsS8Body: The service is provided "as is". To the extent permitted by law, we are not liable for indirect losses or loss of profit. Our total liability is limited to the amount you paid in the last 12 months.
termsS9Body: You can delete your account anytime from Settings. We may suspend or close accounts that violate these terms.
termsS10Body: These terms are governed by Romanian law, and any disputes fall under the jurisdiction of the courts in Romania. For questions:
cookieIntro: {{appName}} uses a minimal set of cookies, strictly necessary for operation.
cookieS1Li1Body: allows us to keep you securely signed in. Strictly necessary — without it the application doesn't work.
cookieS1Li2Body: Stripe may set cookies for secure payment processing and fraud prevention, only during checkout.
cookieS2Body: We do not use marketing, advertising or cross-site tracking cookies. For this reason, we don't ask for your consent via a banner — all cookies are strictly necessary.
cookieS3Body: You can delete or block cookies from your browser settings. Note that blocking the session cookie will prevent you from signing in.
cookieS4Body: If in the future we add tools that use non-essential cookies (for example analytics), we will update this policy and, if necessary, display a consent banner.
